titles.en: Blessed Bedvii Those who Have Five Characteristics

parts.text: حدثنا محمد بن موسى بن المتوكل رضي الله عنه قال

text: : حدثنا عبد الله بن جعفر الحميري، عن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن عبد الله بن ميمون، عن جعفر بن محمد، عن أبيه، عن آبائه، عن علي عليهم السلام قال: قال عيسى بن مريم عليه السلام: طوبى لمن كان صمته فكرا، ونظره عبرا، ووسعه بيته، وبكى على خطيئته. وسلم الناس من يده ولسانه

en.dr-ali-peiravi: 5-63 Muhammad ibn Musa ibn al-Mutevakil - may God be pleased with him - narrated that Abdullah ibn Ja’far al-Homayry quoted Ibrahim ibn Hashim, on the authority of Abdullah ibn Maymun , on the authority of Ja’far ibn Muhammad as-Sadiq (MGB), on the authority of his father (MGB), on the authority of his forefathers, on the authority of Ali (MGB) that Jesus the son of Mary (MGB) said, “Blessed be those who have five characteristics. Blessed be those who think when they are silent; who get advice by looking; who sit at home and cry over their sins; and do not bother the people with their hands or tongues.”
